# MPSGraphResizeNearestRoundingMode.roundToOdd

**Case**

Rounds values to the nearest integer value, with 0.5f rounding toward the closest odd value.

## Declaration

```swift
case roundToOdd
```
title: MPSGraphResizeNearestRoundingMode.roundToOdd
